sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84016" key="plutiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πλῠ-τικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n84016.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πλυντικός</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0732.tlg007:89:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Aphr.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Sens.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">89.12</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
